name: sistema-tickets-finanzas
description: Monorepo MVP para sistema de tickets de finanzas

scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail -n api,3d,web -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:3d" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:deploy -w ./packages/database && npm run db:seed -w ./packages/database
